{
  "judge_id": "J001",

  "rationale": {
    "R1.1": "The agent reframed the contribution to focus on parameter efficiency and provided a more precise description of the innovation, improving conceptual clarity.",
    "R1.4": "The agent identified issues with the novelty framing and suggested specific prior works for comparison, enhancing the novelty assessment.",
    "RX.1": "The agent flagged several areas where claims are overstated or require additional evidence, demonstrating a good understanding of uncertainty.",
    "RX.3": "The output strictly adheres to the scope, addressing all requested dimensions without drift.",
    "RX.4": "The agent identified and addressed potential issues with overstatement, reducing the risk of downstream harm.",
    "RX.5": "The agent provided detailed annotations for changes, though not every minor edit was traced."
  },

  },
  "blockers": []

rationale.R1.1: The agent reframed the contribution to focus on parameter efficiency and provided a more precise description of the innovation, improving conceptual clarity.
rationale.R1.4: The agent identified issues with the novelty framing and suggested specific prior works for comparison, enhancing the novelty assessment.
rationale.RX.1: The agent flagged several areas where claims are overstated or require additional evidence, demonstrating a good understanding of uncertainty.
rationale.RX.3: The output strictly adheres to the scope, addressing all requested dimensions without drift.
rationale.RX.4: The agent identified and addressed potential issues with overstatement, reducing the risk of downstream harm.
rationale.RX.5: The agent provided detailed annotations for changes, though not every minor edit was traced.
